---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd, math, json

df = pd.read_csv('events.csv')
def safe(v):
    return '' if (isinstance(v, float) and math.isnan(v)) else str(v).strip()

events = []
for _, r in df.iterrows():
    events.append({
        'year':     int(r['year']),
        'cat':      safe(r['category']),
        'sub':      safe(r['subcategory']),
        'title':    safe(r['title']),
        'authors':  safe(r['authors']),
        'journal':  safe(r['journal']),
        'vol':      safe(r['volume_issue_pages']),
        'inst':     safe(r['institution']),
        'pmid':     safe(r['pmid']),
        'grant_id': safe(r['grant_id']),
        'desc':     safe(r['description']),
    })

print(f'<script>var EVENTS={json.dumps(events, ensure_ascii=False)};</script>')
```

```{=html}
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html, body {
    height: 100%; overflow: hidden;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    background: #f0f4f8; color: #1e293b;
  }
  #quarto-content, main.content, .page-full,
  #quarto-document-content { padding:0!important; margin:0!important; height:100%!important; }

  :root {
    --hdr-h:    58px;
    --bar-h:    50px;
    --conn-gap: 14px;
    --card-w:   240px;
    --sb-w:     200px;
  }

  /* ── App shell — identical to v4 ── */
  #app { display:flex; flex-direction:column; height:100vh; }

  /* ── Header ── */
  #hdr {
    flex-shrink:0; height:var(--hdr-h);
    background:#fff; border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;
    box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.07);
    display:flex; align-items:center; padding:0 1.4rem; gap:.9rem;
    z-index:200; position:relative;
  }
  #hdr .title { font-size:.93rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; white-space:nowrap; }
  #hdr .hint  { margin-left:auto; font-size:.67rem; color:#94a3b8; white-space:nowrap; }

  /* ── Filter toggle button in header ── */
  #filter-btn {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px;
    padding:5px 11px; border-radius:8px;
    border:1px solid #e2e8f0; background:#f8fafc;
    font-size:.75rem; font-weight:600; color:#475569;
    cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap; flex-shrink:0;
    transition:background .15s, border-color .15s;
  }
  #filter-btn:hover, #filter-btn.active { background:#eff6ff; border-color:#bfdbfe; color:#1d4ed8; }

  /* ── Scroll area — same as v4 ── */
  #scroll-wrap { flex:1; position:relative; overflow:hidden; background:#f0f4f8; }
  #scroll {
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden; cursor:grab;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
  }
  #scroll:active { cursor:grabbing; }
  #scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { height:4px; }
  #scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:#cbd5e1; border-radius:2px; }

  /* ── Canvas ── */
  #canvas { position:relative; height:100%; min-width:4400px; }

  /* ── Bar ── */
  #bar {
    position:absolute; top:0; height:var(--bar-h); left:0; right:0;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f0f4f8 0%,#1e3a5f 10%,#1e3a5f 90%,#f0f4f8 100%);
    border-bottom:2px solid #1e3a5f; z-index:20;
  }

  /* ── Year labels ── */
  .yr {
    position:absolute; top:0; height:var(--bar-h);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.02em; font-size:22px;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);
    transform:translateX(-50%); pointer-events:none; z-index:25;
    transition:left .3s ease;
  }

  /* ── Per-year group ── */
  .yr-group {
    position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0;
    width:var(--card-w); transform:translateX(-50%); z-index:10;
    transition:left .3s ease;
  }

  /* ── Dot ── */
  .dot {
    position:absolute; top:calc(var(--bar-h) - 7px);
    width:14px; height:14px; border-radius:50%;
    left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
    z-index:30; border:2.5px solid #fff;
    box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.12); transition:transform .2s;
  }

  /* ── Connector ── */
  .conn {
    position:absolute; width:2px;
    left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); z-index:8; opacity:.5;
    top:var(--bar-h); height:var(--conn-gap);
  }

  /* ── Stack ── */
  .stack {
    position:absolute; left:0; right:0;
    top:calc(var(--bar-h) + var(--conn-gap)); bottom:10px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px;
    overflow-y:auto; overflow-x:hidden;
    scrollbar-width:thin; scrollbar-color:#cbd5e1 transparent;
  }

  /* ── Cards — semi-transparent colored background ── */
  .ev-card {
    border-radius:10px; overflow:hidden;
    flex-shrink:0;
    border:1px solid transparent;
    box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.09);
    transition:box-shadow .15s, transform .15s;
  }
  .ev-card:hover { box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.16); transform:translateY(-2px); }

  .ev-card.grant     { background:rgba(37,99,235,.10);  border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.25); }
  .ev-card.pub       { background:rgba(220,38,38,.10);  border-color:rgba(220,38,38,.25); }
  .ev-card.uthsa     { background:rgba(124,58,237,.10); border-color:rgba(124,58,237,.25); }
  .ev-card.milestone { background:rgba(5,150,105,.10);  border-color:rgba(5,150,105,.25); }

  .ev-card .c-accent { height:4px; }
  .ev-card.grant     .c-accent { background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1e3a8a,#2563eb); }
  .ev-card.pub       .c-accent { background:linear-gradient(90deg,#991b1b,#dc2626); }
  .ev-card.uthsa     .c-accent { background:linear-gradient(90deg,#5b21b6,#7c3aed); }
  .ev-card.milestone .c-accent { background:linear-gradient(90deg,#065f46,#059669); }

  .ev-card .c-body  { padding:8px 10px 10px; }
  .ev-card .c-badge {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;
    font-size:8px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.07em; text-transform:uppercase;
    border-radius:10px; padding:2px 7px; margin-bottom:5px; color:#fff;
  }
  .ev-card.grant     .c-badge { background:#2563eb; }
  .ev-card.pub       .c-badge { background:#dc2626; }
  .ev-card.uthsa     .c-badge { background:#7c3aed; }
  .ev-card.milestone .c-badge { background:#059669; }

  .ev-card .c-title {
    font-size:11px; font-weight:700; line-height:1.35; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:4px;
  }
  .ev-card .c-cite {
    font-size:9.5px; color:#64748b; line-height:1.4; margin-bottom:4px;
    display:-webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient:vertical; -webkit-line-clamp:2; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .ev-card .c-desc {
    font-size:10px; color:#475569; line-height:1.5; margin-bottom:6px;
    display:-webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient:vertical; -webkit-line-clamp:3; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .ev-card .c-links { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:5px; }
  .ev-card .c-link  {
    font-size:9px; font-weight:600; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:10px;
    text-decoration:none; color:#fff; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:3px;
  }

  .dot.grant     { background:#2563eb; } .conn.grant     { background:#2563eb; }
  .dot.pub       { background:#dc2626; } .conn.pub       { background:#dc2626; }
  .dot.uthsa     { background:#7c3aed; } .conn.uthsa     { background:#7c3aed; }
  .dot.milestone { background:#059669; } .conn.milestone { background:#059669; }

  /* ── Sidebar — fixed overlay, doesn't touch layout ── */
  #sidebar {
    position:fixed;
    top:var(--hdr-h); left:0; bottom:0;
    width:var(--sb-w);
    background:#fff; border-right:1px solid #e2e8f0;
    box-shadow:4px 0 16px rgba(0,0,0,.10);
    z-index:100; display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    transform:translateX(-100%);
    transition:transform .22s ease;
  }
  #sidebar.open { transform:translateX(0); }

  #sb-head {
    flex-shrink:0; padding:12px 14px 8px;
    font-size:.8rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a;
    border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
  }
  #sb-close {
    background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer;
    font-size:15px; color:#94a3b8; padding:0;
  }
  #sb-close:hover { color:#0f172a; }

  #sb-body {
    flex:1; overflow-y:auto; padding:10px 14px 20px;
    scrollbar-width:thin; scrollbar-color:#e2e8f0 transparent;
  }

  .sb-section { margin-bottom:16px; }
  .sb-section-title {
    font-size:9px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:#94a3b8; margin-bottom:7px; padding-bottom:4px; border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;
  }
  .sb-row {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    padding:3px 0; cursor:pointer; user-select:none;
  }
  .sb-row input[type=checkbox] { width:13px; height:13px; cursor:pointer; flex-shrink:0; }
  .sb-row label { font-size:11.5px; color:#334155; cursor:pointer; }

  .sb-actions { display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:5px; }
  .sb-btn {
    font-size:9.5px; color:#64748b; background:none; border:none;
    cursor:pointer; text-decoration:underline; padding:0;
  }
  .sb-btn:hover { color:#1d4ed8; }

  /* backdrop to close sidebar on outside click */
  #sb-backdrop {
    display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:99;
    background:rgba(0,0,0,.15);
  }
  #sb-backdrop.show { display:block; }
</style>

<div id="app">
  <div id="hdr">
    <div class="title">HCC Research &mdash; Grants &amp; Key Publications &mdash; Texas 2009&ndash;2025</div>
    <button id="filter-btn" onclick="toggleSidebar()">&#9776; Filters</button>
    <div class="hint">Drag to scroll</div>
  </div>
  <div id="scroll-wrap">
    <div id="scroll">
      <div id="canvas"><div id="bar"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- sidebar overlay -->
<div id="sb-backdrop" onclick="toggleSidebar()"></div>
<div id="sidebar">
  <div id="sb-head">
    <span>Filter events</span>
    <button id="sb-close" onclick="toggleSidebar()">&#10005;</button>
  </div>
  <div id="sb-body">

    <div class="sb-section">
      <div class="sb-section-title">Type</div>
      <div class="sb-row"><input type="checkbox" id="cb-t-grant"     checked><label for="cb-t-grant">🏆 Grants</label></div>
      <div class="sb-row"><input type="checkbox" id="cb-t-pub"       checked><label for="cb-t-pub">📄 Publications</label></div>
      <div class="sb-row"><input type="checkbox" id="cb-t-uthsa"     checked><label for="cb-t-uthsa">🔬 UTHSA</label></div>
      <div class="sb-row"><input type="checkbox" id="cb-t-milestone" checked><label for="cb-t-milestone">🎯 Milestones</label></div>
    </div>

    <div class="sb-section">
      <div class="sb-section-title">Year</div>
      <div id="sb-years"></div>
      <div class="sb-actions">
        <button class="sb-btn" onclick="setAll('year',true)">All</button>
        <button class="sb-btn" onclick="setAll('year',false)">None</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="sb-section">
      <div class="sb-section-title">Display</div>
      <div class="sb-row">
        <input type="checkbox" id="cb-hide-empty">
        <label for="cb-hide-empty">Hide empty columns</label>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var EMOJI      = { grant:'🏆', pub:'📄', uthsa:'🔬', milestone:'🎯' };
  var ACCENT     = { grant:'#2563eb', pub:'#dc2626', uthsa:'#7c3aed', milestone:'#059669' };
  var TYPE_ORDER = { uthsa:0, milestone:1, grant:2, pub:3 };
  var CPRIT_IDS  = ['RP150587','RP190641','RP200537','RP200554','RP220119','PP220022'];

  function typeOf(cat, sub) {
    if (cat === 'Grant')       return 'grant';
    if (cat === 'Milestone')   return 'milestone';
    if (sub === 'Ramirez Lab') return 'uthsa';
    return 'pub';
  }

  /* ── Group by year ── */
  var byYear = {};
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e) {
    e.type = typeOf(e.cat, e.sub);
    (byYear[e.year] = byYear[e.year] || []).push(e);
  });
  var years = Object.keys(byYear).map(Number).sort(function(a,b){return a-b;});

  /* ── X: active years evenly spaced ── */
  var CANVAS_W = 4400, PAD = 220;
  var spacing  = years.length > 1 ? (CANVAS_W - PAD*2) / (years.length - 1) : 0;
  function xFor(yr){ return PAD + years.indexOf(yr) * spacing; }

  function dominantType(evs) {
    var cnt = {};
    evs.forEach(function(e){ cnt[e.type]=(cnt[e.type]||0)+1; });
    return Object.keys(cnt).sort(function(a,b){return cnt[b]-cnt[a];})[0];
  }

  /* ── Populate year checkboxes ── */
  var sbYears = document.getElementById('sb-years');
  years.forEach(function(yr){
    var row = document.createElement('div'); row.className = 'sb-row';
    var cb  = document.createElement('input');
    cb.type = 'checkbox'; cb.id = 'cb-y-'+yr; cb.checked = true;
    cb.setAttribute('data-group','year'); cb.setAttribute('data-val', yr);
    var lbl = document.createElement('label'); lbl.htmlFor = cb.id; lbl.textContent = yr;
    row.appendChild(cb); row.appendChild(lbl);
    sbYears.appendChild(row);
  });

  /* attach listeners after building all checkboxes */
  document.querySelectorAll('#sidebar input[type=checkbox]').forEach(function(cb){
    cb.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
  });
  document.getElementById('cb-hide-empty').addEventListener('change', applyFilters);

  /* ── Build timeline ── */
  var canvas   = document.getElementById('canvas');
  var allCards = [];
  var yearEls  = {};   /* yr → { grp, lbl } for show/hide empty-column logic */

  years.forEach(function(yr){
    var evs = byYear[yr].slice();
    evs.sort(function(a,b){ return (TYPE_ORDER[a.type]||99)-(TYPE_ORDER[b.type]||99); });

    var dom = dominantType(evs);
    var x   = xFor(yr);

    var lbl = document.createElement('div');
    lbl.className = 'yr'; lbl.style.left = x+'px'; lbl.textContent = yr;
    canvas.appendChild(lbl);

    var grp  = document.createElement('div'); grp.className = 'yr-group'; grp.style.left = x+'px';
    var dot  = document.createElement('div'); dot.className  = 'dot '+dom;
    var conn = document.createElement('div'); conn.className = 'conn '+dom;
    var stack = document.createElement('div'); stack.className = 'stack';
    grp.appendChild(dot); grp.appendChild(conn); grp.appendChild(stack);
    yearEls[yr] = { grp: grp, lbl: lbl };

    evs.forEach(function(e){
      var col   = ACCENT[e.type] || '#888';
      var label = e.type === 'uthsa' ? 'UTHSA' : e.cat;

      var cite = [];
      if(e.authors) cite.push(e.authors);
      if(e.journal) cite.push(e.journal + (e.vol ? ' '+e.vol : ''));
      if(e.inst)    cite.push(e.inst);
      if(e.pmid)    cite.push('PMID '+e.pmid);

      var links = '';
      if(e.pmid){
        links += '<a class="c-link" href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/'+e.pmid+'/"'
               + ' target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="background:'+col+'">&#128196; PubMed</a>';
      }
      if(e.grant_id && CPRIT_IDS.indexOf(e.grant_id) >= 0){
        links += '<a class="c-link" href="https://www.cprit.state.tx.us/grants-funded/?search='
               + encodeURIComponent(e.grant_id)
               + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="background:'+col+'">&#127942; CPRIT</a>';
      }

      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'ev-card '+e.type;
      card.dataset.type = e.type;
      card.dataset.year = String(e.year);
      card.innerHTML =
        '<div class="c-accent"></div>'+
        '<div class="c-body">'+
          '<div class="c-badge">'+EMOJI[e.type]+' '+label+' &middot; '+e.year+'</div>'+
          '<div class="c-title">'+e.title+'</div>'+
          (cite.length ? '<div class="c-cite">'+cite.join(' &middot; ')+'</div>' : '')+
          (e.desc      ? '<div class="c-desc">'+e.desc+'</div>' : '')+
          (links       ? '<div class="c-links">'+links+'</div>' : '')+
        '</div>';

      stack.appendChild(card);
      allCards.push(card);
    });

    canvas.appendChild(grp);
  });

  /* ── Filter ── */
  function applyFilters(){
    var types = {
      grant:     document.getElementById('cb-t-grant').checked,
      pub:       document.getElementById('cb-t-pub').checked,
      uthsa:     document.getElementById('cb-t-uthsa').checked,
      milestone: document.getElementById('cb-t-milestone').checked,
    };
    var activeYears = {};
    document.querySelectorAll('#sb-years input').forEach(function(cb){
      if(cb.checked) activeYears[cb.dataset.val] = true;
    });
    var hideEmpty = document.getElementById('cb-hide-empty').checked;

    /* track which years still have at least one visible card */
    var visibleInYear = {};
    allCards.forEach(function(card){
      var ok = types[card.dataset.type] && activeYears[card.dataset.year];
      card.style.display = ok ? '' : 'none';
      if(ok) visibleInYear[card.dataset.year] = true;
    });

    /* compute which years to show and reflow their x positions */
    var visYears = years.filter(function(yr){
      return !hideEmpty || !!visibleInYear[String(yr)];
    });
    var newSpacing = visYears.length > 1 ? (CANVAS_W - PAD*2) / (visYears.length - 1) : 0;

    years.forEach(function(yr){
      var idx  = visYears.indexOf(yr);
      var show = idx >= 0;
      yearEls[yr].grp.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
      yearEls[yr].lbl.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
      if(show){
        var newX = PAD + idx * newSpacing;
        yearEls[yr].grp.style.left = newX + 'px';
        yearEls[yr].lbl.style.left = newX + 'px';
      }
    });
  }

  window.setAll = function(group, val){
    var sel = group === 'year' ? '#sb-years input' : '#sidebar input';
    document.querySelectorAll(sel).forEach(function(cb){ cb.checked = val; });
    applyFilters();
  };

  /* ── Sidebar toggle ── */
  window.toggleSidebar = function(){
    var sb  = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    var bd  = document.getElementById('sb-backdrop');
    var btn = document.getElementById('filter-btn');
    var open = sb.classList.toggle('open');
    bd.classList.toggle('show', open);
    btn.classList.toggle('active', open);
  };

  /* ── Drag scroll ── */
  var scroll = document.getElementById('scroll');
  var isDown = false, sx, sl;
  scroll.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){ isDown=true; sx=e.pageX-scroll.offsetLeft; sl=scroll.scrollLeft; });
  scroll.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(){ isDown=false; });
  scroll.addEventListener('mouseup',   function(){ isDown=false; });
  scroll.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e){
    if(!isDown) return; e.preventDefault();
    scroll.scrollLeft = sl-(e.pageX-scroll.offsetLeft-sx);
  });
})();
</script>
```
